title: Torrezx-Rocket boost
description: change the charge of the breeze for a rocket
body:
Torrezx-Rocket boost

ESPAÑOL-Las cargas de brisa ahora son un divertido gran cohete,el cohete se vera atras de tu

espalda,puedes ponerlo en la mano secundaria o en tu mano principal,podras escoger tu color

favorito de cohete.disponible 3 variantes: rojo-azul-amarillo


ENGLISH-The breeze charges are now a fun big rocket, the rocket will be seen behind your

back, you can put it in your secondary hand or your main hand, you can choose your color

rocket favorite. available 3 variants: red-blue-yellow
